blockers.description: Golden dataset is empty — tests/fixtures/golden/ has 0 files. Need 20+ real PDF fixtures.
blockers.workaround: User must place real PDFs in pdfs-to-test/ and run batch-fixtures

human_actions_pending.action: Place 20+ real insurance PDFs (2 per insurer) in pdfs-to-test/ directory
human_actions_pending.context: Insurers: Zurich, Qualitas, Mapfre, AXA, GNP, Chubb, Ana, HDI, Plan Seguro, Prudential. Name files by insurer/type for auto-detection.
Creates golden fixtures from PDFs, redacts PII, validates with regression tests

human_actions_pending.action: Review extractions in HITL UI (localhost:8000), correct any errors
human_actions_pending.context: Two-step process per D-02: raw fixtures first, then review/correct before committing

human_actions_pending.action: Commit golden fixtures: git add tests/fixtures/golden/ && git commit
human_actions_pending.context: Fixtures must be committed for regression tests to run in CI

decisions.decision: fpdf2 for PDF reports instead of WeasyPrint
Auto-eval triggers after any extraction when batch >= 10, 20% sample
decisions.rationale: User prefers higher quality coverage over cost savings

decisions.decision: Batch script creates raw fixtures, user reviews in HITL UI before finalizing
decisions.rationale: Two-step process is safer than trusting raw extraction output

next_action: Place 20+ real PDFs in pdfs-to-test/, run batch-fixtures, review in HITL UI, commit fixtures, then /gsd:verify-work 17
context_notes: Phase 17 tooling is 100% complete (batch-fixtures CLI + coverage matrix plugin, 480 tests pass). The only gap is the actual golden fixture data which requires the user's real insurance PDFs. After fixtures are created and committed, run /gsd:verify-work 17 to confirm phase goal, then /gsd:complete-milestone to finish v2.0.
